title: Aurora World Ltd Gruffalo Sitting, 16-inch
description: Product Description This Gruffalo 16 inch is inspired from the Julia Donaldson children's book, The Gruffalo. Now you can have your very own soft and cuddly Gruffalo to take everywhere with you and love. Also available in 7 inch and 9 inch sizes. Choking hazard - small parts - not for children under 3 years. Surface washable / all new materials / polyester fibres age: 3+. Approx. 16 inches top to bottom, not in sitting pose.
